instruction: Summarize why it's important to differentiate this CVE from CVE-2022-2414.
input: There is an unauthorized buffer overflow vulnerability in Tenda AX12 v22.03.01.21 _ cn. This vulnerability can cause the web service not to restart or even execute arbitrary code. It is a different vulnerability from CVE-2022-2414.
output: Distinct identification of vulnerabilities like CVE-2023-XYZ and CVE-2022-2414 is crucial for accurate vulnerability management and ensures appropriate remediation actions are applied.
